SEARCH
Package timgutilities.textio

Class ChoiceDescription<P>

java.lang.Object
timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription<P>
Type Parameters:
P - If using the ChoiceDescription to hold an object (for example when listing directory entries) then P represents the object type is is holding
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<ChoiceDescription<?>>
public class ChoiceDescription<P> extends Object implements Comparable<ChoiceDescription<?>>
This class represents a single choice that is used for the choice based methods. There are up to 4 fields for the entry: option is displayed n the list of choices - cannot be null description is used to display any descriptive text - can be null additional is further text the rotines may somtimes display this param is a typed object and all choice descriptions int he same choice description data must be of the same type. for some selecion methods the param can be returned so you don;t have to handle mapping the return in a lookup or anything like that Additionally this can be a separator - in this case it's printed out by the choice routines, but is not selectable.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    EMPTY_TEXT
    Used as a default for the description and additional fields if they are not specified
    static final String
    FIELD_SEPARATOR
    Used by getText if the results should be separated

    Description

    Create an instance only containing an option.

    Create an instance only containing an option.

    Create an instance containing an option and param.

    Create an instance containing an option, description and param.

    Create an instance containing an option, description, additional and param.

    Create an instance containing an option, description, additional and associated parameter.
    ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, P param)
    Create an instance containing an option, description and associated parameter.
    ChoiceDescription(String option, P param)
    Create an instance containing an option and associated parameter.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    compareTo(ChoiceDescription<?> o)
     
    String
    getAdditional()
    Gets any optional additional information you have chosen to provide
    String
    getData(boolean separateFields)
    returns the "display" text, if separateFields it true then the output is split by the FIELD_SEPARATOR, if it's false then the option, description and additional are just concatenated together
    String
    getDescription()
    Gets the optional description field, for example you may want to provide a description of an option
    String
    getOption()
    Gets the value of the option for this ChoiceDescription (usually this is the string that will be displayed when using the chooser)
    P
    getParam()
    Gets the optional param object, this allows you to easily associate an object with a choice, enabling the object to be easily determined based on a particular choice
    boolean
    isSeparatorEntry()
    If this choice is being provided to separate groups of options, then this can be used to determine that this is option cannot be selected
    String
    toString()

  • Field Details

    • EMPTY_TEXT

      public static final String EMPTY_TEXT
      Used as a default for the description and additional fields if they are not specified

      Used by getText if the results should be separated

  • Constructor Details

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option)
      Create an instance only containing an option. The description, additional are set to EMPTY_STRING and param is set to null
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description)
      Create an instance only containing an option and description. The additional is set to EMPTY_STRING and param is set to null
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, String additional)
      Create an instance only containing an option, description and additional. The param is set to null
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      additional - the text of the additional field

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, boolean separatorEntry)
      Create an instance only containing an option. The description, additional are set to EMPTY_STRING and param is set to null
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      separatorEntry - if true this will be marked as a separator, and the chooser will display it but not let it be selected

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, boolean separatorEntry)
      Create an instance only containing an option and description. The additional is set to EMPTY_STRING and param is set to null
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      separatorEntry - if true this will be marked as a separator, and the chooser will display it but not let it be selected

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, String additional, boolean separatorEntry)
      Create an instance only containing an option, description and additional. The param is set to null
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      additional - the text of the additional field
      separatorEntry - if true this will be marked as a separator, and the chooser will display it but not let it be selected

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, P param)
      Create an instance containing an option and associated parameter. The description, additional are set to EMPTY_STRING.
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      param - the param to associate with this option

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, P param)
      Create an instance containing an option, description and associated parameter. The additional is set to EMPTY_STRING.
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      param - the param to associate with this option

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, String additional, P param)
      Create an instance containing an option, description, additional and associated parameter.
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      additional - the text of the description
      param - the param to associate with this option

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, boolean separatorEntry, P param)
      Create an instance containing an option and param. The description, additional are set to EMPTY_STRING
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      separatorEntry - if true this will be marked as a separator, and the chooser will display it but not let it be selected
      param - the param to associate with this option

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, boolean separatorEntry, P param)
      Create an instance containing an option, description and param. The additional is set to EMPTY_STRING
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      separatorEntry - if true this will be marked as a separator, and the chooser will display it but not let it be selected
      param - the param to associate with this option

    • ChoiceDescription

      public ChoiceDescription(String option, String description, String additional, boolean separatorEntry, P param)
      Create an instance containing an option, description, additional and param.
      Parameters:
      option - the text of the option
      description - the text of the description
      additional - the text of the additional
      separatorEntry - if true this will be marked as a separator, and the chooser will display it but not let it be selected
      param - the param to associate with this option

  • Method Details

    • getOption

      public String getOption()
      Gets the value of the option for this ChoiceDescription (usually this is the string that will be displayed when using the chooser)
      Returns:
      the option test, for display when choosing an option of potentially to determin the option choice (e.g. if you're selecting an ENUM based on the possible value names)

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Gets the optional description field, for example you may want to provide a description of an option
      Returns:
      the description

    • getAdditional

      public String getAdditional()
      Gets any optional additional information you have chosen to provide
      Returns:
      the additional

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getData

      public String getData(boolean separateFields)
      returns the "display" text, if separateFields it true then the output is split by the FIELD_SEPARATOR, if it's false then the option, description and additional are just concatenated together
      Parameters:
      separateFields - if true the resulting string will have the FIELD_SEPARATOR inserted between them as they are concatenated, if false they will just be concatenated. This makes it easier to have option, description, additional if needed in the choice output
      Returns:
      text representing the option, description and additional data

    • getParam

      public P getParam()
      Gets the optional param object, this allows you to easily associate an object with a choice, enabling the object to be easily determined based on a particular choice
      Returns:
      the param you may have specified to be associated with this choice

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(ChoiceDescription<?> o)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<P>

    • isSeparatorEntry

      public boolean isSeparatorEntry()
      If this choice is being provided to separate groups of options, then this can be used to determine that this is option cannot be selected
      Returns:
      the separatorEntry
